coachAM: Your aspiration to be a "lock in young with a clear" vision and "the best worker, the best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" is directly undermined by your severely compromised Sleep Protocol and Training, collapsing your physical foundation and leaving you ill-equipped to resist the "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness" you identify. The fundamental breakdown is a glaring inconsistency between your stated high-level ambitions and the foundational physical and mental discipline required to sustain them, manifesting in a critical deficit of self-regulation when faced with immediate gratification and discomfort. Today, before anything else, block out 9:30 PM on your calendar as non-negotiable for sleep preparation, and hold it.
